mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount FROM km_document WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT document_status as documentStatus, COUNT(*) as statusCount FROM km_document WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY document_status

SELECT DATE(created_at) as uploadDate, COUNT(*) as dailyUploadCount FROM km_document WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY uploadDate
SELECT COUNT(*) as failedCount FROM km_document WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND document_status = 'FAILED'
SELECT document_status as documentStatus, COUNT(*) as statusCount FROM km_document WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND document_status IN ('READY', 'PENDING_REVIEW') GROUP BY document_status
